messages.content: I need a user login feature with email and password, return a token on success

plan.description: Create user model and database schema for storing user credentials including email and password hash

interface.name: createUserModel
interface.description: Creates a User model with email and password fields, and implements password hashing using bcrypt

plan.description: Implement email format validation function to check if email follows correct pattern

interface.name: validateEmailFormat
interface.description: Validates email format using regex pattern matching

plan.description: Create login form component with email and password input fields

interface.name: createLoginRoute
interface.description: Creates POST /login route that accepts email and password from request body

plan.description: Implement password hashing and verification utilities using bcrypt or similar library

interface.name: findUserByEmail
interface.description: Finds user by email in the database, returns null if user doesn't exist

plan.description: Create authentication token generation function with JWT that includes 24-hour expiration

interface.name: verifyPassword
interface.description: Compares provided password with stored bcrypt hash

plan.description: Implement login API endpoint that accepts email and password, validates inputs, and returns token or error

interface.name: generateAuthToken
interface.description: Generates JWT token with user ID and email as payload

plan.description: Create error handling middleware for authentication failures with appropriate error messages

interface.name: login
interface.description: Complete login flow: validates credentials, generates token, returns token in response

plan.description: Write integration tests for login functionality covering success and failure scenarios

interface.name: createAuthErrorHandler
interface.description: Middleware that handles authentication errors with appropriate error messages

requirements.title: User Login with Email and Password
requirements.description: Implement a user authentication system that accepts email and password credentials, validates them against stored user data, and returns an authentication token upon successful verification.
acceptance_criteria: System accepts email and password input fields
System validates email format is correct
System verifies password matches stored hash for the provided email
System returns a secure authentication token upon successful login
System returns appropriate error message for invalid credentials
Token has expiration time of 24 hours

progress_text: 当前进度：开发计划已生成，正在补全接口定义。
